query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE client_id = u.id) as citas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE client_id = u.id) as cotizaciones,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE client_id = u.id) as proyectos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE user_id = u.id) as clientes
FROM users u
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%prueba%' OR u.name LIKE '%test%' OR u.name LIKE '%prueba%'
ORDER BY u.id
LIMIT 50;
